description: Scanning, hacking, and survival basics for exploration income.
recommended_for: Pilots who want low-capital income outside trade hubs.

required_skills.name: Archaeology
required_skills.economic_impact: More successful cans and fewer failed sites.

optional_skills.name: Astrometric Rangefinding
optional_skills.economic_impact: Reduces time wasted scanning difficult sites.

warnings: Exploration income varies heavily; do not carry more loot than you can afford to lose.
